Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10088 0 0}Hey, uh, about last time... I looked like a complete idiot, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10063 0 0}Can you just... forget that ever happened?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 0 25 25}When I try to sleep, I keep remembering how I acted then, and it makes me want to scream...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}I haven't gotten over it yet, but... for now, I just wanna forget about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems relieved...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 0 25 25}Well... I guess if it's just my best friend who saw me at my lowest, that's not so bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika's smile looks forced...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10077 0 0}{f 5 13 2 15 101}Oh, nothing! If you don't remember, then don't worry about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems relieved...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10083 0 0}Man, talking so much is giving me an appetite again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I've gotten back to my usual groove! Anyways, you should eat some more, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us hung out for a while before[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
